headline: Everest and Stone Point launch Annapurna Re casualty sidecar
summary: The vehicle is designed to deploy around $600m in third-party capital across a three-year underwriting period, channelling dedicated reinsurance capacity into Everest's global casualty and specialty reinsurance portfolios.
